title: Armor Stand Arms
description: RPG Style, Use a command to easily show arms on your armor stands
body:
**DESCRIPTION** Your vanilla experience will now be further enhanced thanks to the ability to easily and quickly add arms to all your armor stands. Simply go near an armor stand you have already placed and use the command /trigger armorstandarms  and it will create the arms for you.  Make sure you are at least 3 blocks or less distance from the armor stand.  This will work server-side and is not required on the client for playing on servers.   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/899/637/armor-stand-arms-screenshot.png)   Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off! [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1068/671/53840b7f-f250-4a97-8995-c3544ae3e296.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/gamerpotion)  

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/958/418/join-discord.png)](https://discord.gg/uCPfPBvsRJ)
